# ttd client

Manage the clients you bill. See the [Clients & projects guide](../../guides/clients-and-projects.md) for workflows.

```console
ttd client COMMAND
```

Manage clients.

**Commands**:

* [`add`](#client-add): Add a client.
* [`archive`](#client-archive): Archive a client (hidden from lists, history kept).
* [`edit`](#client-edit): Edit a client.
* [`list`](#client-list): List clients.
* [`rm`](#client-rm): Delete a client. Refuses if it has projects unless --force.

## client add

```console
ttd client add [OPTIONS] [ARGS]
```

Add a client.

**Parameters**:

* `NAME, --name`: Client display name
* `--rate`: Default hourly rate, e.g. 150
* `--currency`:
* `--slug`: Override the generated slug
* `--contact`:
* `--email`:
* `--address`:
* `--interactive, --no-interactive, -i`: Fill remaining fields via a form  *\[default: False\]*

## client list

```console
ttd client list [OPTIONS]
```

List clients.

**Parameters**:

* `--archived, --no-archived`: Include archived  *\[default: False\]*

## client edit

```console
ttd client edit [OPTIONS] SLUG
```

Edit a client.

**Parameters**:

* `SLUG, --slug`:   **\[required\]**
* `--name`:
* `--slug`:
* `--rate`: Default hourly rate, e.g. 150
* `--currency`:
* `--contact`:
* `--email`:
* `--address`:

## client archive

```console
ttd client archive SLUG
```

Archive a client (hidden from lists, history kept).

**Parameters**:

* `SLUG, --slug`:   **\[required\]**

## client rm

```console
ttd client rm [OPTIONS] SLUG
```

Delete a client. Refuses if it has projects unless --force.

**Parameters**:

* `SLUG, --slug`:   **\[required\]**
* `--force, --no-force`: Also delete projects and entries  *\[default: False\]*
